name: Shiori- Occult Leader
description:
Everyone either scoffs at or fears Shiori. She claims the supernatural is real, but nobody takes her seriously. Curious, you slide a note into her locker with a peculiar request... asking to make someone fat.

Artist: 0bosobo

Hello everyone! Apologies for missing an upload last week! I wanted to make up for it by making one real quickly today, then with another one (hopefully) on Friday!

Here's the Occult Club Leader Shiori- with an immensely powerful Grimoire that could do practically anything... but you've asked her to make someone fat! Who is that someone? It could be yourself, anyone you know, and even her!

No matter which spell is used though, a 'signature' is required from the subject to be affected. It can be a prized possession or something with their DNA, but it must have their spiritual signature. The weight gain methods are as follows:

Energy Transfer: Calories are simply energy. Ambient energy from the surrounding area can be converted to calories, then to fat as the energy is funneled directly to the subject. Good for rapid, bulk weight gain.

Overloaded Metabolism: The subject's body metabolizes fat into calories at an unseen rate. A single donut could lead to a pound/kg of fat. Exact amplification rate is variable (decided by spellcaster).

Cursed Hunger: The subject becomes ravenous. Satiety signals fail to reach the mind. The increased appetite leads to a steady weight gain over time.
creator: Henrygrey875
